  • Method Details

    • testQuery

      public static void testQuery() throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getAllCountries

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Countries> getAllCountries() throws SQLException
      This Method retrieves all the countries from the database.
      Returns:
      a ObservableList of Countries containing country ID's and names.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getCountriesByDivisionID

      public static Countries getCountriesByDivisionID(int divisionID) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a country associated with a divisionID.
      Parameters:
      divisionID - the divisionID to retrieve the associated country.
      Returns:
      a Countries Object containing the country information.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs.

    • getCustomersByCountry

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Countries> getCustomersByCountry()
      Retrieves the total number of appointments for each country.
      Returns:
      an ObservableList of CountriesWithTotal, containing the country name and total appointments.

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the controller.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - the Location of the FXML file.
      resourceBundle - the resource used to Localize the root object.
